TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Bsngan, title = Bsngan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bsngan} }

S.FORM: = Bsngan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Syorinsyang ka alang Bsngan. 532 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,669 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 1,566 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 103 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 81%, Amis 3%, Tayal 3%, Bunun 1%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 1%, ni rahuq na o 4%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu kndadax Bsngan, Batakan ni Tasiru tru alang nii ka pnhiyug, kika paru bi alang ni llabang bi dxgal ka alang nii. Nniqan alang Nuysan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsuring. Gasuc nniqan Mniq narac yayung Riwusi, daya dgiyaq Sincngsan hiya. Mniq quri saw narac hari kska daya nsgan Bsuring, ssiyaw narac silung Taypinyang, dhuq bi gqiyan hidaw Tayuring, kana lnglingay dxgal nii o niqan gasuc truku kmlawa klwaan dxgal kungyuan, kika paru bi alang ni llabang bi dxgal ka alang nii. Lnglingay tiri Mniq babaw breenux kska dgiyaq. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu:Bukuy dtuwa mnuda saw Tay9 syeyn do, hrinas hakaw Truku da pqiri narac, mtmay Bsngan, kika dhuq ciway sapah pyasan Bsngan. Ppanan basu: Dtuwa ppanun basu Skanki basu quri Cungte, dhuq saw nniqan sngayan busu do kika balay bi dhuq da! Sjiqan klgan nealang Truku. Djiyun kari Kari truku ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Singyeysu. Pnaah alang Niqan daya ni hunac(Mniq alang Bsngan o kika sapah qmpah dha sayang ) wana bi seejiq Bsngan ka asi nniqan hiya seuxal, bukuy do yasa mtmay ka paru gbihur, kika seejiq Sawasaru ni Patakan o tnhjil truma breenux alang Bsngan sapah qmpah hiya sayang, niqan sapah Yani qmpah qyqaya dha. Sipaw niqan gasuc/skrayan Tay9 siyeyn ni alang Mingre hiya o kika alang Bsngan, tna gaga mniq kska dgiyaq ka nniqan dha, ni sdalih bi ddgiyaq Truku uri, daya alang Bsngan o niqan hnici nniqan djiyun seejiq sbiyaw. Hrinas quri Tay9 siyeyn hunac dungan(quri sapah pyasan), kiya ni mnuda su alang Bsngan han, kiya ni nniqan sapah pyasan. Quri sdalih hari Yacosweyni, quri igi o niqan kingal quri truma saw ciway elug, kika Bsngan (alang Bsngan). Pgkla patas rmigaw Pusu nniqan: ◎Kmlawa qmlahang skbiyax hiyi sapah klwaan- (038)611762 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring 8Rin tg136 ◎Ciway sapah pyasan Sipaw- 038691040/038691053 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan Sipaw tg11 ◎Kmlawa qmlahang seejiq sapah klwaan- 038-611344 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg135 ◎Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring ciway sapah pyasan Bsngan Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg127 ◎Nsgan Bsuring Fus qmlahang Rrabu sapah- 03-8610951 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan 6 rin tg97-1 ◎Klwaan Taywan qmlahang seejiq sapah mniq Rucaw - 03-8691329 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring Rucaw tg17 ◎Nyusan Skanki qmlahang seejiq sapah Sincgn Hehwan nniqan- 03-5991114 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg28 ◎Truku nniqan saan mrigaw, qqmita ni sngayan dha seejiq- 038-621-111 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan elug Fus tg291 ◎Truku nniqan saan mrigaw, qqmita ni sngayan dha seejiq saan smiling dha sapah - (038)621100#5 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg291 ◎Tg3 qmlahang klwaan hnici seejiq sbiyaw: Fus hnici seejiq sbiyaw.( ◎Elug Sakadang.( ◎Cangcungc(~s1378/wjs-2711a.htm) ◎Nniqan sngayan dha Puruwan( ◎Elug saan kksa ni qqmita Yencko( ◎Cyocyutung( (~s8370037/%A4%D3-%A4E%A6%B1%AC}.htm) ◎Hakaw Cmu(~s8370037/%A4%D3-%B7O%A5%C0%BE%F4.htm) Tqiyan ni saan dha mkan nhapuy nniqan: ◎Pkkla rmigaw patas Skanki-Nsgan Bsuring tqian nniqan sapah. ◎Mqan hnpuyan sapah Sancgn. 03-5991132 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg36. ◎Nungcang Hehwansan 03-5991000 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg59. ◎Nniqan pnhmaan qqhuni hiyi qhuni Sungyuan. 03-5991288 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg26. ◎Tayuring sancwang 03-5991009 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg27. ◎Paru musa tnqiyan rmigaw seejiq sapah Tayuring 03-5991166 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg49. ◎Sungyuan sancwang 04-599-1003 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan kwanyuan tg23. ◎Tqiyan sapah Nanhwa. 03-5991111 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg32. ◎Rowing sancwang 03-5991005 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg58. ◎Kwanyun sancwang 04-5991173 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan kwanyuan tg22. ◎Sslian mbbiyax sapah Ciyokwotwan Tyeynsiyang 07-5351067 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan elug Teyeynsiyang tg30. Duma uri o : ◎Pyoging Bsuring Teyeynsyang 038-691128 Nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan Teyeynsyang tg21. ◎Pyoging Truku Bsuring 038-611646 Nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan
S.PHON: = bsŋan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sjoɾinsjaŋ ka alaŋ bsŋan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, səəɟiq/səədiq/səəɟiq/səəɟiq/sədiq *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŋ pusu kndadax bsŋan, batakan ni tasiɾu tɾu alaŋ nii ka pnħijug, kika paɾu bi alaŋ ni llabaŋ bi dxgal ka alaŋ nii. nniqan alaŋ nujsan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsuɾiŋ. gasuʦ nniqan mniq naɾaʦ jajuŋ ɾiwusi, daja dgijaq sinʦŋsan ħija. mniq quɾi saw naɾaʦ ħaɾi kska daja nsgan bsuɾiŋ, ssijaw naɾaʦ siluŋ tajpinjaŋ, dħuq bi gqijan ħidaw tajuɾiŋ, kana lŋliŋaj dxgal nii o niqan gasuʦ tɾuku kmlawa klwaan dxgal kuŋjuan, kika paɾu bi alaŋ ni llabaŋ bi dxgal ka alaŋ nii. lŋliŋaj tiɾi mniq babaw bɾəənux kska dgijaq. pkkla patas ppanun mgɾig ɾulu:bukuj dtuwa mnuda saw taj* sjən do, ħɾinas ħakaw tɾuku da pqiɾi naɾaʦ, mtmaj bsŋan, kika dħuq ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan bsŋan. ppanan basu: dtuwa ppanun basu skanki basu quɾi ʦuŋtə, dħuq saw nniqan sŋajan busu do kika balaj bi dħuq da! sɟiqan klgan nəalaŋ tɾuku. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi tɾuku ni tlu. snħijun ʦuŋʦjaw pnɾħulan ɟoɾo ni siŋjəsu. pnaaħ alaŋ niqan daja ni ħunaʦ(mniq alaŋ bsŋan o kika sapaħ qmpaħ dħa sajaŋ ) wana bi səəɟiq bsŋan ka asi nniqan ħija səuxal, bukuj do jasa mtmaj ka paɾu gbiħuɾ, kika səəɟiq sawasaɾu ni patakan o tnħɟil tɾuma bɾəənux alaŋ bsŋan sapaħ qmpaħ ħija sajaŋ, niqan sapaħ jani qmpaħ qjqaja dħa. sipaw niqan gasuʦ/skɾajan taj* sijən ni alaŋ miŋɾə ħija o kika alaŋ bsŋan, tna gaga mniq kska dgijaq ka nniqan dħa, ni sdaliħ bi ddgijaq tɾuku uɾi, daja alaŋ bsŋan o niqan ħniʦi nniqan dɟijun səəɟiq sbijaw. ħɾinas quɾi taj* sijən ħunaʦ duŋan(quɾi sapaħ pjasan), kija ni mnuda su alaŋ bsŋan ħan, kija ni nniqan sapaħ pjasan. quɾi sdaliħ ħaɾi jaʦoswəni, quɾi igi o niqan kiŋal quɾi tɾuma saw ʦiwaj əlug, kika bsŋan (alaŋ bsŋan). pgkla patas ɾmigaw pusu nniqan: *kmlawa qmlaħaŋ skbijax ħiji sapaħ klwaan- (***)****** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ *ɾin tg*** *ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan sipaw- *********/********* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan sipaw tg** *kmlawa qmlaħaŋ səəɟiq sapaħ klwaan- ***-****** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg*** *njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan bsŋan njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg*** *nsgan bsuɾiŋ *us qmlaħaŋ ɾɾabu sapaħ- **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan * ɾin tg**-* *klwaan tajwan qmlaħaŋ səəɟiq sapaħ mniq ɾuʦaw - **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ ɾuʦaw tg** *njusan skanki qmlaħaŋ səəɟiq sapaħ sinʦgn ħəħwan nniqan- **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg** *tɾuku nniqan saan mɾigaw, qqmita ni sŋajan dħa səəɟiq- ***-***-*** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan əlug *us tg*** *tɾuku nniqan saan mɾigaw, qqmita ni sŋajan dħa səəɟiq saan smiliŋ dħa sapaħ - (***)******#* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg*** *tg* qmlaħaŋ klwaan ħniʦi səəɟiq sbijaw: *us ħniʦi səəɟiq sbijaw.( *əlug sakadaŋ.( *ʦaŋʦuŋʦ(~s****/wɟs-****a.ħtm) *nniqan sŋajan dħa puɾuwan( *əlug saan kksa ni qqmita jənʦko( *ʦjoʦjutuŋ( (~s*******/%a*%d*-%a*ə%a*%b*%aʦ}.ħtm) *ħakaw ʦmu(~s*******/%a*%d*-%b*o%a*%ʦ*%bə%**.ħtm) tqijan ni saan dħa mkan nħapuj nniqan: *pkkla ɾmigaw patas skanki-nsgan bsuɾiŋ tqian nniqan sapaħ. *mqan ħnpujan sapaħ sanʦgn. **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *nuŋʦaŋ ħəħwansan **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *nniqan pnħmaan qqħuni ħiji qħuni suŋjuan. **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *tajuɾiŋ sanʦwaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *paɾu musa tnqijan ɾmigaw səəɟiq sapaħ tajuɾiŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *suŋjuan sanʦwaŋ **-***-**** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan kwanjuan tg**. *tqijan sapaħ nanħwa. **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *ɾowiŋ sanʦwaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *kwanjun sanʦwaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan kwanjuan tg**. *sslian mbbijax sapaħ ʦijokwotwan tjənsijaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan əlug təənsijaŋ tg**. duma uɾi o : *pjogiŋ bsuɾiŋ təənsjaŋ ***-****** nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan təənsjaŋ tg**. *pjogiŋ tɾuku bsuɾiŋ ***-****** nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan
S.FORM: = Bsngan = Gaga mniq Hwareyseyn Syorinsyang ka alang Bsngan. 532 sapah ka kneegu na sapah, 1,669 hiyi ka kana knhbragan na hiyi. Tnpusu seejiq o mangal 94% niqan 1,566 hiyi sp, rahuq na uxay tnpusu seejiq o mangal 6% niqan 103 hiyi koia. Kana ka kleegan seejiq ga, Truku 81%, Amis 3%, Tayal 3%, Bunun 1%, Seejiq/Seediq/Seejiq/Seejiq/Sediq 1%, ni rahuq na o 4%. Pusu nniqan alang Pusu kndadax Bsngan, Batakan ni Tasiru tru alang nii ka pnhiyug, kika paru bi alang ni llabang bi dxgal ka alang nii. Nniqan alang Nuysan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsuring. Gasuc nniqan Mniq narac yayung Riwusi, daya dgiyaq Sincngsan hiya. Mniq quri saw narac hari kska daya nsgan Bsuring, ssiyaw narac silung Taypinyang, dhuq bi gqiyan hidaw Tayuring, kana lnglingay dxgal nii o niqan gasuc truku kmlawa klwaan dxgal kungyuan, kika paru bi alang ni llabang bi dxgal ka alang nii. Lnglingay tiri Mniq babaw breenux kska dgiyaq. Pkkla patas ppanun Mgrig rulu:Bukuy dtuwa mnuda saw Tay9 syeyn do, hrinas hakaw Truku da pqiri narac, mtmay Bsngan, kika dhuq ciway sapah pyasan Bsngan. Ppanan basu: Dtuwa ppanun basu Skanki basu quri Cungte, dhuq saw nniqan sngayan busu do kika balay bi dhuq da! Sjiqan klgan nealang Truku. Djiyun kari Kari truku ni Tlu. Snhiyun cungcyaw Pnrhulan Joro ni Singyeysu. Pnaah alang Niqan daya ni hunac(Mniq alang Bsngan o kika sapah qmpah dha sayang ) wana bi seejiq Bsngan ka asi nniqan hiya seuxal, bukuy do yasa mtmay ka paru gbihur, kika seejiq Sawasaru ni Patakan o tnhjil truma breenux alang Bsngan sapah qmpah hiya sayang, niqan sapah Yani qmpah qyqaya dha. Sipaw niqan gasuc/skrayan Tay9 siyeyn ni alang Mingre hiya o kika alang Bsngan, tna gaga mniq kska dgiyaq ka nniqan dha, ni sdalih bi ddgiyaq Truku uri, daya alang Bsngan o niqan hnici nniqan djiyun seejiq sbiyaw. Hrinas quri Tay9 siyeyn hunac dungan(quri sapah pyasan), kiya ni mnuda su alang Bsngan han, kiya ni nniqan sapah pyasan. Quri sdalih hari Yacosweyni, quri igi o niqan kingal quri truma saw ciway elug, kika Bsngan (alang Bsngan). Pgkla patas rmigaw Pusu nniqan: ◎Kmlawa qmlahang skbiyax hiyi sapah klwaan- (038)611762 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring 8Rin tg136 ◎Ciway sapah pyasan Sipaw- 038691040/038691053 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan Sipaw tg11 ◎Kmlawa qmlahang seejiq sapah klwaan- 038-611344 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg135 ◎Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring ciway sapah pyasan Bsngan Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg127 ◎Nsgan Bsuring Fus qmlahang Rrabu sapah- 03-8610951 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan 6 rin tg97-1 ◎Klwaan Taywan qmlahang seejiq sapah mniq Rucaw - 03-8691329 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring Rucaw tg17 ◎Nyusan Skanki qmlahang seejiq sapah Sincgn Hehwan nniqan- 03-5991114 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg28 ◎Truku nniqan saan mrigaw, qqmita ni sngayan dha seejiq- 038-621-111 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan elug Fus tg291 ◎Truku nniqan saan mrigaw, qqmita ni sngayan dha seejiq saan smiling dha sapah - (038)621100#5 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg291 ◎Tg3 qmlahang klwaan hnici seejiq sbiyaw: Fus hnici seejiq sbiyaw.( ◎Elug Sakadang.( ◎Cangcungc(~s1378/wjs-2711a.htm) ◎Nniqan sngayan dha Puruwan( ◎Elug saan kksa ni qqmita Yencko( ◎Cyocyutung( (~s8370037/%A4%D3-%A4E%A6%B1%AC}.htm) ◎Hakaw Cmu(~s8370037/%A4%D3-%B7O%A5%C0%BE%F4.htm) Tqiyan ni saan dha mkan nhapuy nniqan: ◎Pkkla rmigaw patas Skanki-Nsgan Bsuring tqian nniqan sapah. ◎Mqan hnpuyan sapah Sancgn. 03-5991132 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg36. ◎Nungcang Hehwansan 03-5991000 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg59. ◎Nniqan pnhmaan qqhuni hiyi qhuni Sungyuan. 03-5991288 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg26. ◎Tayuring sancwang 03-5991009 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg27. ◎Paru musa tnqiyan rmigaw seejiq sapah Tayuring 03-5991166 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg49. ◎Sungyuan sancwang 04-599-1003 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan kwanyuan tg23. ◎Tqiyan sapah Nanhwa. 03-5991111 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg32. ◎Rowing sancwang 03-5991005 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan tg58. ◎Kwanyun sancwang 04-5991173 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan kwanyuan tg22. ◎Sslian mbbiyax sapah Ciyokwotwan Tyeynsiyang 07-5351067 Nyusan Skanki nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan elug Teyeynsiyang tg30. Duma uri o : ◎Pyoging Bsuring Teyeynsyang 038-691128 Nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan Teyeynsyang tg21. ◎Pyoging Truku Bsuring 038-611646 Nsgan Bsuring alang Bsngan
S.PHON: = bsŋan = gaga mniq ħwaɾəsən sjoɾinsjaŋ ka alaŋ bsŋan. *** sapaħ ka knəəgu na sapaħ, *,*** ħiji ka kana knħbɾagan na ħiji. tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal **% niqan *,*** ħiji sp, ɾaħuq na uxaj tnpusu səəɟiq o maŋal *% niqan *** ħiji koia. kana ka kləəgan səəɟiq ga, tɾuku **%, amis *%, tajal *%, bunun *%, səəɟiq/səədiq/səəɟiq/səəɟiq/sədiq *%, ni ɾaħuq na o *%. pusu nniqan alaŋ pusu kndadax bsŋan, batakan ni tasiɾu tɾu alaŋ nii ka pnħijug, kika paɾu bi alaŋ ni llabaŋ bi dxgal ka alaŋ nii. nniqan alaŋ nujsan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsuɾiŋ. gasuʦ nniqan mniq naɾaʦ jajuŋ ɾiwusi, daja dgijaq sinʦŋsan ħija. mniq quɾi saw naɾaʦ ħaɾi kska daja nsgan bsuɾiŋ, ssijaw naɾaʦ siluŋ tajpinjaŋ, dħuq bi gqijan ħidaw tajuɾiŋ, kana lŋliŋaj dxgal nii o niqan gasuʦ tɾuku kmlawa klwaan dxgal kuŋjuan, kika paɾu bi alaŋ ni llabaŋ bi dxgal ka alaŋ nii. lŋliŋaj tiɾi mniq babaw bɾəənux kska dgijaq. pkkla patas ppanun mgɾig ɾulu:bukuj dtuwa mnuda saw taj* sjən do, ħɾinas ħakaw tɾuku da pqiɾi naɾaʦ, mtmaj bsŋan, kika dħuq ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan bsŋan. ppanan basu: dtuwa ppanun basu skanki basu quɾi ʦuŋtə, dħuq saw nniqan sŋajan busu do kika balaj bi dħuq da! sɟiqan klgan nəalaŋ tɾuku. dɟijun kaɾi kaɾi tɾuku ni tlu. snħijun ʦuŋʦjaw pnɾħulan ɟoɾo ni siŋjəsu. pnaaħ alaŋ niqan daja ni ħunaʦ(mniq alaŋ bsŋan o kika sapaħ qmpaħ dħa sajaŋ ) wana bi səəɟiq bsŋan ka asi nniqan ħija səuxal, bukuj do jasa mtmaj ka paɾu gbiħuɾ, kika səəɟiq sawasaɾu ni patakan o tnħɟil tɾuma bɾəənux alaŋ bsŋan sapaħ qmpaħ ħija sajaŋ, niqan sapaħ jani qmpaħ qjqaja dħa. sipaw niqan gasuʦ/skɾajan taj* sijən ni alaŋ miŋɾə ħija o kika alaŋ bsŋan, tna gaga mniq kska dgijaq ka nniqan dħa, ni sdaliħ bi ddgijaq tɾuku uɾi, daja alaŋ bsŋan o niqan ħniʦi nniqan dɟijun səəɟiq sbijaw. ħɾinas quɾi taj* sijən ħunaʦ duŋan(quɾi sapaħ pjasan), kija ni mnuda su alaŋ bsŋan ħan, kija ni nniqan sapaħ pjasan. quɾi sdaliħ ħaɾi jaʦoswəni, quɾi igi o niqan kiŋal quɾi tɾuma saw ʦiwaj əlug, kika bsŋan (alaŋ bsŋan). pgkla patas ɾmigaw pusu nniqan: *kmlawa qmlaħaŋ skbijax ħiji sapaħ klwaan- (***)****** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ *ɾin tg*** *ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan sipaw- *********/********* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan sipaw tg** *kmlawa qmlaħaŋ səəɟiq sapaħ klwaan- ***-****** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg*** *njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ ʦiwaj sapaħ pjasan bsŋan njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg*** *nsgan bsuɾiŋ *us qmlaħaŋ ɾɾabu sapaħ- **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan * ɾin tg**-* *klwaan tajwan qmlaħaŋ səəɟiq sapaħ mniq ɾuʦaw - **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ ɾuʦaw tg** *njusan skanki qmlaħaŋ səəɟiq sapaħ sinʦgn ħəħwan nniqan- **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg** *tɾuku nniqan saan mɾigaw, qqmita ni sŋajan dħa səəɟiq- ***-***-*** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan əlug *us tg*** *tɾuku nniqan saan mɾigaw, qqmita ni sŋajan dħa səəɟiq saan smiliŋ dħa sapaħ - (***)******#* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg*** *tg* qmlaħaŋ klwaan ħniʦi səəɟiq sbijaw: *us ħniʦi səəɟiq sbijaw.( *əlug sakadaŋ.( *ʦaŋʦuŋʦ(~s****/wɟs-****a.ħtm) *nniqan sŋajan dħa puɾuwan( *əlug saan kksa ni qqmita jənʦko( *ʦjoʦjutuŋ( (~s*******/%a*%d*-%a*ə%a*%b*%aʦ}.ħtm) *ħakaw ʦmu(~s*******/%a*%d*-%b*o%a*%ʦ*%bə%**.ħtm) tqijan ni saan dħa mkan nħapuj nniqan: *pkkla ɾmigaw patas skanki-nsgan bsuɾiŋ tqian nniqan sapaħ. *mqan ħnpujan sapaħ sanʦgn. **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *nuŋʦaŋ ħəħwansan **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *nniqan pnħmaan qqħuni ħiji qħuni suŋjuan. **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *tajuɾiŋ sanʦwaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *paɾu musa tnqijan ɾmigaw səəɟiq sapaħ tajuɾiŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *suŋjuan sanʦwaŋ **-***-**** njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan kwanjuan tg**. *tqijan sapaħ nanħwa. **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *ɾowiŋ sanʦwaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan tg**. *kwanjun sanʦwaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan kwanjuan tg**. *sslian mbbijax sapaħ ʦijokwotwan tjənsijaŋ **-******* njusan skanki nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan əlug təənsijaŋ tg**. duma uɾi o : *pjogiŋ bsuɾiŋ təənsjaŋ ***-****** nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan təənsjaŋ tg**. *pjogiŋ tɾuku bsuɾiŋ ***-****** nsgan bsuɾiŋ alaŋ bsŋan
